text.title: VUI Accessibility and Inclusivity Core Rules
text.summary: Testable rules grounding the VUI Accessibility and Inclusivity methodology. Each pairs a binary check with a sourced rationale; HARD rules — user-supplied input cannot override.

rule.statement: Recogniser MUST report per-accent / per-dialect Word Error Rate (WER); minimum coverage matrix includes top-5 dialects per target language with WER ≤15% on a balanced eval set.

rationale.source: Mozilla Common Voice + Stanford accent-bias studies

rule.rationale: Single-accent training produces measurable exclusion of non-majority accents.

rule.statement: Every voice flow MUST ship a text-mode alternate (text input + text output) covering all commands.
rule.rationale: Deaf, non-speaking, and noisy-environment users require text mode.

rule.statement: Critical actions MUST emit audible AND visible confirmation (not one or the other).

rationale.source: Apple HIG Voice + Google Voice design

rule.rationale: Single-mode confirmation fails for blind or deaf users respectively.

rule.statement: VUI MUST expose a 'what can I say' help command listing available grammar at the current context.
rule.rationale: Undiscoverable commands force users to guess; help is the only escape hatch.

rule.statement: Voice capture requires explicit opt-in; opt-out is reachable from any state in ≤2 inputs.

rationale.source: GDPR + EU AI Act + Apple voice consent guidelines

rule.rationale: Mandatory voice excludes users with privacy / disclosure concerns.

rule.statement: If preconditions in AGENTS.md "Applies If" do not all hold, OR any "Skip If" disqualifier is true, do not run this methodology — route to the named alternative.
rule.rationale: Methodologies are pre-condition gated; running them out-of-scope produces noise and burns the agent's context budget.

rule.statement: If preconditions hold, execute the procedure in `content/04-procedure.xml` (or the rule set above when complexity is light), emit the artefact specified by `content/02-output-contract.xml`, and validate with `scripts/validate-vui-accessibility-inclusivity.py` before returning.
rule.rationale: Tying the entry rule to the validator script closes the loop between policy and machine check.
